description:STRING: 'This one-room world is a template for creating a simple world.   Objects include a ceiling
geometry:STRING: and an entry point object (this moves avatars to their original spot on entering the room).  You can change the walls and add objects with the wizards

description:STRING: 'The grid world is a template for creating a world with your own design.  It consists of one three-dimensional room.  The grid quadrants are 10 by 10 units (one unit equals one yard) plotted along the x and z axes in a grid format. The entry-point object moves avatars to their original spot on entering the world.  You can change the room by using the wizards
